subject: Question about my case #1
body: I have a question regarding my case. Could you please provide an update?

subject: Re: Question about my case #1
body: Thank you for your inquiry. Regarding your case, I wanted to inform you that...

subject: Question about my case #2
body: I have a question regarding my case. Could you please provide an update?

subject: Documents needed for divorce filing
body: Could you please tell me what documents I need to gather for the divorce filing?

subject: Re: Documents needed for divorce filing
body: You will need to provide financial statements, property deeds, and any prenuptial agreements.

subject: Visa application status inquiry
body: I wanted to check on the current status of my H-1B visa application.

subject: Re: Visa application status inquiry
body: Your H-1B petition has been submitted and is currently under USCIS review. Expected decision in 3-4 months.

subject: Will signing appointment
body: I would like to schedule an appointment to sign my will. What times are available?

subject: Invoice INV-2024-003 question
body: I received invoice INV-2024-003 but have a question about the court filing charges.

subject: Re: Invoice INV-2024-003 question
body: The court filing charges on your invoice relate to the deed recording fees for your property closing.

subject: Case settlement offer received
body: I received a settlement offer from the opposing party. Should I accept it?

subject: Bankruptcy hearing date
body: What is the date and time for the first day of my Chapter 11 hearing?

subject: Re: Bankruptcy hearing date
body: Your initial bankruptcy hearing is scheduled for April 15 at 10:00 AM in Courtroom 4B.

subject: Patent application update needed
body: Has the USPTO responded to our patent application yet?

subject: Contract dispute mediation
body: Is mediation an option to resolve our contract dispute more quickly?

subject: Re: Contract dispute mediation
body: Yes, mediation is a viable option. I recommend we explore this before proceeding to litigation.

subject: Deposition preparation question
body: I'm nervous about my upcoming deposition. What should I expect?

subject: Re: Deposition preparation question
body: I will schedule a prep session with you before the deposition. Answer only what is asked and stay calm.

subject: IRS audit response timeline
body: How long do we have to respond to the IRS audit notice?

subject: Environmental permit application
body: What is the status of the environmental permit application for our new facility?

subject: Probate timeline question
body: Approximately how long will the probate process take to complete?

subject: Re: Probate timeline question
body: Probate typically takes 6-12 months. Your estate should be straightforward, so we expect 7-8 months.

subject: Non-compete enforcement question
body: We need an injunction against the former employee immediately. How quickly can this happen?

subject: Medical expert witness question
body: Has the medical expert reviewed all the surgical records in our malpractice case?

subject: Construction contract final review
body: Are there any outstanding issues with the construction contract before we sign?

subject: Trade compliance certificate
body: We need a certificate of compliance for our export shipment next week. Can you provide this?
